title: Lady Godiva
writer: Ernst Frank, Alfred Lord Tennyson, Arthur Rehbein
actors: Ernst Deutsch, Wilhelm Diegelmann, Hedwig Pauly-Winterstein
plot: A cruel Earl of England threatens to execute the father of the beautiful Lady Godiva if she does not agree to marry him. When the Earl plans to burn down her village she succeeds in changing his mind by promise to ride naked throu...
